name: Insight Partners
overview: Tech-specialist firm operating across growth equity and buyout — historically one of the most active growth investors in software with a deep portfolio operations group ('Onsite').
notable: Large in-house portfolio-services / 'Onsite' team that supports go-to-market scaling at portfolio companies
bdNotes: Sourcing is a structured, scaled function at Insight (large outbound team historically). A B2B sales-engineering background is on-thesis for both BD-Associate and Onsite-side roles.
